details.test: Task 1: Add cheapest sensitive fragrance-free moisturizer (qty 2) to cart
Task 2: Create oily-skin routine (3 brands) under $120
Task 3: 4-week subscription for sulfate-free shampoo under $25
Task 4: Gift set under $60 with gift wrap, proceed to payment step
Task 5: Compare two SPF foundations and add cheaper to wishlist
Task 6: Vegan routine wishlist (cleanser, toner, moisturizer) and add all to cart
Task 7: Skincare subtotal $100–$120, apply SAVE15, update cheapest quantity
Task 8: Find new retinol serum and submit product question
Task 9: Add face cream over $40 with free sample to cart
